description:
An aerospace historian is building a high-fidelity OpenVSP model of the P-51D Mustang. The first step is to configure the background reference images correctly. 

A blueprint image (p51_top_view.jpg) and a specification file (blueprint_setup.txt) have been placed in /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/. 

1. Read blueprint_setup.txt to find the calibration data (real-world wingspan and pixel wingspan).
2. Calculate the correct Image Scale (Model Units per Pixel).
3. Open OpenVSP, navigate to the Background image dialog (Window -> Background).
4. Load p51_top_view.jpg into the Top viewport background.
5. Enter your calculated Scale value into the dialog.
6. Save the OpenVSP model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/p51_workspace.vsp3.
